headline: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Valuation Check As Business Model And Leadership Overhaul Takes Shape
summary: Southwest Airlines (LUV) is in the middle of a rare reset, scrapping open seating and its long running two free checked bags policy while rolling out premium options and refreshing its leadership structure. See our latest analysis for Southwest Airlines. Those business model changes and leadership moves have come after a period of mixed price action, with the share price at US$41.54 and only modest short term moves. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 26.6% contrasts with a 5 year...
